doctors.name: Dr. Sarah Chen
doctors.bio: Dr. Sarah Chen is a board-certified Psychiatry specialist at Mayo Clinic with 11 years of clinical experience. Their expertise spans Depression, and they are recognised for a compassionate, evidence-based approach to complex patient care.

doctors.name: Dr. Marcus Webb
doctors.bio: Dr. Marcus Webb is a board-certified Cardiac Surgery specialist at Johns Hopkins Hospital with 18 years of clinical experience. Their expertise spans Coronary Artery Disease, and they are recognised for a compassionate, evidence-based approach to complex patient care.

doctors.name: Dr. Priya Nair
doctors.bio: Dr. Priya Nair is a board-certified Radiation Oncology specialist at Cleveland Clinic with 23 years of clinical experience. Their expertise spans Breast Cancer and Lung Cancer, and they are recognised for a compassionate, evidence-based approach to complex patient care.

doctors.name: Dr. James Harrison
doctors.bio: Dr. James Harrison is a board-certified Pulmonology specialist at Massachusetts General Hospital with 29 years of clinical experience. Their expertise spans Lung Cancer, and they are recognised for a compassionate, evidence-based approach to complex patient care.

doctors.name: Dr. Elena Vasquez

doctors.name: Dr. David Kim

doctors.name: Dr. Maria Santos
doctors.bio: Dr. Maria Santos is a board-certified Interventional Cardiology specialist at Mount Sinai Hospital with 7 years of clinical experience. Their expertise spans Coronary Artery Disease, and they are recognised for a compassionate, evidence-based approach to complex patient care.

doctors.name: Dr. Robert Mueller
doctors.bio: Dr. Robert Mueller is a board-certified Neuroimmunology specialist at Northwestern Memorial Hospital with 16 years of clinical experience. Their expertise spans Multiple Sclerosis, and they are recognised for a compassionate, evidence-based approach to complex patient care.

doctors.name: Dr. Angela Okafor
doctors.bio: Dr. Angela Okafor is a board-certified Gastroenterology specialist at Duke University Hospital with 13 years of clinical experience. Their expertise spans Crohn's Disease, and they are recognised for a compassionate, evidence-based approach to complex patient care.

doctors.name: Dr. Chen Liu
doctors.bio: Dr. Chen Liu is a board-certified Psychology specialist at Vanderbilt University Medical Center with 22 years of clinical experience. Their expertise spans Depression, and they are recognised for a compassionate, evidence-based approach to complex patient care.

doctors.name: Dr. Thomas Patel
doctors.bio: Dr. Thomas Patel is a board-certified Surgical Oncology specialist at Brigham and Women's Hospital with 7 years of clinical experience. Their expertise spans Breast Cancer, and they are recognised for a compassionate, evidence-based approach to complex patient care.

doctors.name: Dr. Fatima Reyes
doctors.bio: Dr. Fatima Reyes is a board-certified Dermatology specialist at Stanford Health Care with 31 years of clinical experience. Their expertise spans Lupus, and they are recognised for a compassionate, evidence-based approach to complex patient care.

doctors.name: Dr. Nathan Park
doctors.bio: Dr. Nathan Park is a board-certified Endocrinology specialist at NYU Langone Health with 33 years of clinical experience. Their expertise spans Type 2 Diabetes, and they are recognised for a compassionate, evidence-based approach to complex patient care.

doctors.name: Dr. Lisa Thompson
doctors.bio: Dr. Lisa Thompson is a board-certified Nephrology specialist at Mayo Clinic with 11 years of clinical experience. Their expertise spans Type 2 Diabetes and Lupus, and they are recognised for a compassionate, evidence-based approach to complex patient care.

doctors.name: Dr. Kevin Williams
doctors.bio: Dr. Kevin Williams is a board-certified Internal Medicine specialist at Johns Hopkins Hospital with 6 years of clinical experience. Their expertise spans Type 2 Diabetes and Rheumatoid Arthritis, and they are recognised for a compassionate, evidence-based approach to complex patient care.

experiences.raw_text: I was diagnosed with Type 2 Diabetes (Newly Diagnosed) about 14 months ago. My care team recommended SGLT2 Inhibitors, and the overall journey has been manageable with good support. During treatment I experienced hypoglycemia, vision_blurring, neuropathy. My recovery took approximately 522 days. I'm still navigating the day-to-day challenges but making slow progress.

I was diagnosed with Breast Cancer (Stage III) about 26 months ago. My care team recommended Surgery, and the overall journey has been life-changing and ultimately rewarding. During treatment I experienced neuropathy. My recovery took approximately 379 days. I feel hopeful and grateful for the care I received.

I was diagnosed with Parkinson's Disease (Stage 3) about 26 months ago. My care team recommended Physical Therapy, and the overall journey has been life-changing and ultimately rewarding. During treatment I experienced falls, tremor. My recovery took approximately 1653 days. I feel hopeful and grateful for the care I received.

I was diagnosed with Rheumatoid Arthritis (Severe) about 21 months ago. My care team recommended JAK Inhibitors, and the overall journey has been life-changing and ultimately rewarding. During treatment I experienced morning_stiffness, fatigue. My recovery took approximately 582 days. I feel hopeful and grateful for the care I received.

I was diagnosed with Multiple Sclerosis (Relapsing-Remitting) about 28 months ago. My care team recommended Ocrelizumab, and the overall journey has been life-changing and ultimately rewarding. During treatment I experienced spasticity, fatigue, depression. My recovery took approximately 260 days. I feel hopeful and grateful for the care I received.

I was diagnosed with Rheumatoid Arthritis (Moderate) about 24 months ago. My care team recommended JAK Inhibitors, and the overall journey has been life-changing and ultimately rewarding. During treatment I experienced anemia, morning_stiffness, fatigue. My recovery took approximately 463 days. I feel hopeful and grateful for the care I received.

I was diagnosed with Depression (Treatment-Resistant) about 2 months ago. My care team recommended Ketamine, and the overall journey has been very difficult — I wish I had more resources earlier. During treatment I experienced weight_changes, sleep_disturbance, emotional_blunting. My recovery took approximately 331 days. I'm still navigating the day-to-day challenges but making slow progress.

circle_posts.raw_text: Just completed 6 months of Surgery for Breast Cancer. Happy to share my journey.
Just completed 6 months of Dopamine Agonists for Parkinson's Disease. Happy to share my journey.
Has anyone tried Levodopa for Parkinson's Disease? Would love to hear your experience.
My doctor suggested switching to Ocrelizumab. Has this worked for others with Multiple Sclerosis?
Looking to connect with others managing Type 2 Diabetes at the Newly Diagnosed stage.
My doctor suggested switching to CABG Surgery. Has this worked for others with Coronary Artery Disease?
